message:
🐛 Add explicit console.kubestellar.io hostname to forced demo mode check (#358)

Belt-and-suspenders: VITE_DEMO_MODE is already baked in at build time,
but add explicit hostname check for console.kubestellar.io so demo mode
is forced even if the env var is somehow missing at runtime.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
